data.title: China Urges U.S. to Halt 232 Tariffs on Imports
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the Ministry of Commerce held a routine press conference on May 15. The spokesperson, He Yongqian, addressed the U.S. actions regarding the 232 tariffs on imported automobiles, steel, aluminum, and the investigation into imported pharmaceuticals. China views these measures as unilateral and protectionist, arguing that they harm other countries' interests and undermine the rule-based multilateral trade system, while also being detrimental to the U.S. domestic industry.

China calls on the U.S. to promptly cease the 232 tariff measures and resolve concerns through equitable dialogue.

data.title: U.S. Retail Sales and PPI Data May Influence Federal Reserve's Rate Decisions
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the United States is set to release its retail sales data and Producer Price Index (PPI) at 20:30 UTC+8. These figures are anticipated to significantly impact market expectations regarding future interest rate cuts by the Federal Reserve. Weaker-than-expected PPI and retail sales data could revive dovish expectations for the Federal Reserve, potentially weakening the dollar and providing support for gold prices.

In anticipation of the effects of U.S. tariffs, the retail sales data released tonight is expected to show substantial growth, although there are opinions suggesting the data might fall short of expectations. Meanwhile, the annual inflation rate for the U.S. PPI in April is projected to decrease to 2.5%. The interpretation of these two major data points may be contradictory, making it difficult for investors to draw definitive conclusions.

Ten minutes after the release of these key data points, Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell will deliver the opening remarks at the second Federal Reserve Thomas Laubach Research Conference at 20:40 UTC+8. The conference will focus on research related to monetary policy and economic issues, providing an academic perspective for the Federal Reserve's commitment to reviewing its monetary policy framework every five years. The conference will continue until the 16th.

data.title: Ministry of Commerce: China urges the US to stop 232 tariff measures as soon as possible
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On the afternoon of May 15, the Ministry of Commerce held a regular press conference. Ministry of Commerce spokesperson He Yongqian: Regarding the US 232 tariffs on imported cars, steel and aluminum and the US 232 investigation on imported drugs, China believes that the US approach is a typical unilateralism and protectionism, which not only harms the rights and interests of other countries and undermines the rules-based multilateral trading system, but also is not conducive to the development of its own industry. China urges the US to stop the 232 tariff measures as soon as possible and properly resolve the concerns of all parties through equal dialogue. (Riyue Tantian)

data.title: Big Short on Wall Street: Shorting Strategy and Buying Bitcoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Jim Chanos, a well-known Wall Street short, is betting on Bitcoin and shorting MicroStrategy at the same time. The company has adopted a high-risk cryptocurrency strategy with the support of enthusiastic retail investors. Chanos said: "We are shorting Strategy shares and buying Bitcoin, basically buying at $1 and selling at $2.5." Chanos said: "If you look at Strategy, and some of the more worrying imitation companies now, they are raising a lot of money, basically selling retail investors the idea that we will buy Bitcoin in a corporate structure. Because of Strategy's approach, you should value us at a similar premium." However, Chanos called the idea "ridiculous." Strategy shares have soared more than 220% in the past year, while Bitcoin prices have risen nearly 70% in the same period. Trump has been a public supporter of cryptocurrencies, and cryptocurrency prices have risen sharply since he announced broad tariffs in early April. Chanos said this transaction "is not only a good barometer of arbitrage itself, but I think it is also an indicator of retail speculation." (CNBC)

data.title: The whales who had previously shorted BTC, ETH, and SOL have made a profit of $2.17 million on BTC and $1.77 million on SOL
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale who previously shorted BTC, ETH and SOL successfully turned losses into profits in the market correction. He has currently made a profit of $2.17 million on BTC and $1.77 million on SOL, but still lost $141,000 on ETH. The latest data shows that the whale has begun to gradually close SOL short positions to lock in profits.

data.title: China and U.S. Agree to Establish Trade Consultation Mechanism
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the Chinese Ministry of Commerce held a routine press conference today, where a spokesperson addressed questions regarding the China-U.S. trade consultation mechanism. The spokesperson, He Yongqian, stated that China remains open to resolving trade concerns through dialogue and communication. Following the consensus reached during the China-U.S. talks in Geneva, both parties have agreed to establish a trade consultation mechanism to maintain communication on their respective trade concerns. China will release relevant information in due course.

data.title: Smart Chain Trading Platform TrendX Now Opens Core Trading Functions
data.description:

TrendX has integrated core modules such as smart DEX trading, on-chain data analysis, KOL dynamic insights, smart money signals, and custom strategy triggers. TrendX is committed to lowering the threshold for on-chain transactions, improving efficiency and security, allowing users to easily get started and deeply explore the Web3 world.

data.title: Actress Hwang Jung-eum Faces Charges Over Misuse of Company Funds for Cryptocurrency Investment
data.description:
According to PANews, South Korean actress Hwang Jung-eum has been charged with misappropriating funds from her talent agency, which she controls, to invest in cryptocurrency. The Jeju District Court held the first public hearing on May 15, 2025, regarding the case.

The indictment reveals that between early 2022 and December of the same year, Hwang diverted a total of 4.34 billion Korean won from the company, with 4.2 billion won allocated to cryptocurrency investments.

Hwang's legal representative acknowledged the charges, stating that the investments were made with the intention of developing the company, emphasizing that the profits would ultimately benefit Hwang. Currently, Hwang is working to repay some of the losses by selling cryptocurrency and planning to sell real estate. The court has accepted the request to proceed with the compensation-related procedures.

data.title: Binance Wallet Launches $100,000 SolvBTC Rewards Campaign With Yei Finance
data.description: Supply SolvBTC via Simple Yield to share $50,000 in $SEI and $50,000 in $SOLV rewardsBinance Wallet has partnered with Yei Finance and Solv Protocol to launch an exclusive Simple Yield campaign, offering users a chance to share $100,000 in rewards by supplying SolvBTC.Activity PeriodMay 15, 2025 – June 13, 2025 (UTC)Daily Reward Pool: $3,333.33Total Rewards: $100,000 in crypto$50,000 in SEI$50,000 in SOLVHow to ParticipateUpdate your Binance App to the latest versionBridge SolvBTC to the Sei Network using Interport or Free.techGo to Binance Wallet → Earn → Simple Yield → Protocol → Yei → SolvBTCSupply at least 0.001 SolvBTC to the Yei SolvBTC PoolOnce you complete the process, you’ll receive ayeiSolvBTC in your Sei EVM wallet.Reward Distribution ExampleIf the daily TVL is 1 SolvBTC and you supply 0.01 SolvBTC:0.01 / 1 × $3,333.33 = $33.33 daily rewardRewards are based on your proportional share of the daily pool.APR Boost OpportunityReal-Time APR + Promotion Boosted APRAPR fluctuates based on TVL and market activityRewards distributed within 6 weeks of campaign end:SEI rewards → Sei NetworkSOLV rewards → BNB Chain
